hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ex|*.exs) cd $HOME/severance && mix format "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ex|*.exs) cd $HOME/severance && mix credo --strict "$f" ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

output=$(cd $HOME/severance && mix format --check-formatted 2>&1 && mix compile --warnings-as-errors 2>&1 && mix credo --strict 2>&1 && mix test 2>&1); rc=$?; if [ $rc -ne 0 ]; then echo "$output" | tail -30 | jq -Rs '{continue: false, stopReason: "Pre-commit checks failed", hookSpecificOutput: {hookEventName: "PreToolUse", additionalContext: .}}'; fi
